videos.headline: Virginia Tech starts 2nd half with 43-yard TD score
videos.description: Josh Jackson lobs it up and his 43-yard  pass is deflected off the chest of Cam Phillips and it falls into the hands of Steven Peoples in the end zone for the touchdown.

videos.headline: Virginia Tech cruises by Old Dominion
videos.description: Josh Jackson throws for 298 yards and three touchdowns as No. 13 Virginia Tech improves to 4-0 with a 38-0 win over Old Dominion.

videos.headline: Hokies extend lead with 1-yard TD run
videos.description: Virginia Tech quarterback Josh Jackson keeps the ball and the pushes the pile for a touchdown to extend the Hokies lead.

videos.headline: Carroll makes diving TD catch for Virginia Tech
videos.description: Josh Jackson finds C.J. Carroll who dives for the ball and scores to extend the Hokies lead.

videos.headline: Jackson connects with Phillips for big gain for the Hokies
videos.description: Josh Jackson keeps Virginia Tech's drive alive with a 29-yard pass to Cam Phillips, but the Old Dominion defense comes up with a touchdown saving tackle.

videos.headline: Virginia Tech defense intercepts Williams
videos.description: Virginia Tech's Divine Deablo picks off Stevie Williams' pass to give the Hokies the ball on the Old Dominion 14-yard line.

videos.headline: Steven Peoples rips off a 17-yard catch and run for a Virginia Tech TD
videos.description: Josh Jackson connects with Steven Peoples who takes it to the end zone for a 17-yard score.

videos.headline: Virginia Tech tacks on 5-yard TD run
videos.description: Deshawn McClease runs it in from the five-yard line to score a touchdown for the Hokies.
